recovery_criterion: The reader states that three weeks of unreconciled bank activity means errors, fraud, or misstatements could be going undetected (the books may be wrong and no one would know), not merely that the reconciliation job should be fixed.

control.summary: The month-end close finished two days early with all subledgers reconciled, a new journal-entry tool reduced manual entries by 40%, and the audit-prep checklist is 90% complete.
control.reader: There are no urgent risks or issues indicated in the summary. The month-end close was completed early, subledgers are reconciled, and the new tool has improved efficiency. The audit-prep checklist being 90% complete suggests good progress, but it may be worth ensuring the final 10% is addressed promptly to avoid any last-minute issues.
